4:["$","li","13",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Tax Treaties**: Tie-breaker rules in Double Taxation Agreements"}]
5:["$","br","14",{"className":"block h-4"}]
6:["$","h3","15",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Controlled Foreign Corporations (CFCs)"}]
7:["$","p","16",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"SARS rules for foreign companies:"}]
8:["$","br","17",{"className":"block h-4"}]
9:["$","li","18",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Control Threshold**: >50% participation rights by SA residents"}]
a:["$","li","19",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Attribution Rules**: Income attributed to controlling residents"}]
b:["$","li","20",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Deemed Dividends**: CFC income treated as dividends"}]
c:["$","li","21",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Exemption Limits**: Small CFC exemptions (R1 million annual limit)"}]
d:["$","br","22",{"className":"block h-4"}]
e:["$","h3","23",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Foreign Income Exemptions"}]
f:["$","p","24",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Certain foreign income may be exempt:"}]
10:["$","br","25",{"className":"block h-4"}]
11:["$","li","26",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Foreign Employment Income**: Services rendered abroad (subject to conditions)"}]
12:["$","li","27",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Foreign Dividends**: May qualify for exemption up to certain limits"}]
13:["$","li","28",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Interest Exemptions**: Limited exemptions for foreign interest"}]
14:["$","li","29",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Capital Gains**: Some foreign capital gains may be exempt"}]

19:["$","p","34",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"South Africa's network of tax treaties:"}]
1a:["$","br","35",{"className":"block h-4"}]
1b:["$","li","36",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Treaty Benefits**: Reduced withholding taxes, exemption from tax"}]
1c:["$","li","37",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Tie-Breaker Rules**: Determining primary taxing rights"}]
1d:["$","li","38",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Non-Discrimination**: Equal treatment with domestic taxpayers"}]
1e:["$","li","39",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Mutual Agreement Procedure**: Resolving disputes between countries"}]
1f:["$","br","40",{"className":"block h-4"}]
20:["$","h3","41",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"OECD Guidelines"}]

22:["$","br","43",{"className":"block h-4"}]
23:["$","li","44",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Arm's Length Principle**: Transfer pricing guidelines"}]
24:["$","li","45",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Base Erosion and Profit Shifting (BEPS)**: Anti-avoidance measures"}]
25:["$","li","46",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Country-by-Country Reporting**: Transparency for multinationals"}]
26:["$","li","47",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Global Minimum Tax**: 15% minimum tax rate (Pillar Two)"}]
27:["$","br","48",{"className":"block h-4"}]
28:["$","h3","49",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Common Reporting Standard (CRS)"}]
29:["$","p","50",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Automatic exchange of financial information:"}]
2a:["$","br","51",{"className":"block h-4"}]
2b:["$","li","52",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Financial Institutions**: Required to report account holder information"}]

2f:["$","br","56",{"className":"block h-4"}]

32:["$","h3","59",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Branch Operations"}]
33:["$","p","60",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Direct presence in foreign markets:"}]
34:["$","br","61",{"className":"block h-4"}]
35:["$","p","62",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Advantages:"}]
36:["$","li","63",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Simple Setup**: Easier establishment process"}]
37:["$","li","64",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Direct Control**: Centralized management"}]
38:["$","li","65",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Tax Transparency**: Income taxed in home country"}]
39:["$","li","66",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Flexibility**: Easy to restructure or close"}]
3a:["$","br","67",{"className":"block h-4"}]
3b:["$","p","68",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Disadvantages:"}]
3c:["$","li","69",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Unlimited Liability**: Parent company liable for branch debts"}]
3d:["$","li","70",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Permanent Risk**: May create permanent establishment"}]
3e:["$","li","71",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Compliance Burden**: Multiple jurisdiction filings"}]
3f:["$","li","72",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Limited Benefits**: May not access treaty benefits"}]
40:["$","br","73",{"className":"block h-4"}]
41:["$","h3","74",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Subsidiary Companies"}]

43:["$","br","76",{"className":"block h-4"}]
44:["$","p","77",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Advantages:"}]
45:["$","li","78",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Limited Liability**: Separate legal personality"}]
46:["$","li","79",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Treaty Access**: Can access DTA benefits"}]
47:["$","li","80",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Local Presence**: Better market integration"}]
48:["$","li","81",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Risk Isolation**: Separates foreign operations"}]
49:["$","br","82",{"className":"block h-4"}]
4a:["$","p","83",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Disadvantages:"}]
4b:["$","li","84",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Complex Setup**: More establishment requirements"}]
4c:["$","li","85",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Compliance Costs**: Separate filing and reporting"}]

4e:["$","li","87",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Repatriation Issues**: Restrictions on profit repatriation"}]
